item.title: Why Analog Communication is Still Relevant in a Digital World
item.description: Why is analog communication still releventin a world where almost everything is digital? Let's explore how analog communication works and why it might come back in the future.

item.title: About Me
item.description: A bit about who I am.

item.title: Design and Characterization of a Pixel Readout chip to emulate Global Shutter
item.description: How does an matrix of pixels work and convert light to an image ?

item.title: GPS-Free Drone Navigation Using Computer Vision
item.description: What if a drone could figure out where it is using nothing but its camera?

item.title: Méditations Métaphysiques - René Descartes
item.description: René Descartes' foundational work in philosophy

item.title: Nausea - Jean-Paul Sartre
item.description: Jean-Paul Sartre's first and most famous novel

item.title: Sign Language Controlled Robot
item.description: What if a robot could understand sign language and respond to it in real time?

item.title: SPQR (Histoire de l'ancienne Rome) - Mary Beard
item.description: Everything you need to know about Rome
